name: Connie's Pumpkin Pie - Swss13b
recipeInstructions:
1. Put pumpkin in a bowl.
2. Add egg yolks, sugar, and pumpkin pie spices to the pumpkin mixture. Beat for five minutes.
3. Quickly add cream, whiskey, and butter to the mixture and mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together cornstarch and stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
5. Gently fold the cornstarch mixture into the pumpkin batter.
6. Pour the filling into prepared pie shells.
7. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour. Makes 2 9-inch pies.
Personal Note: When my daughter was young, we lived in an apartment with someone living upstairs. This recipe comes from that person. If I don't have pumpkin pie spices on hand, I use mostly cinnamon with a little nutmeg and allspice to make up the 2 tablespoons required.
